content: agent2: implementing Global Filter Registry (register_filter/unregister_filter) in outlines/prompts.py. Will add module-level registry dict and wire into Prompt rendering. Let me know if you're touching this file too.

agent2: my feature only touches env.filters application in Prompt._template_from_str / _template_from_file (adding env.filters.update(GLOBAL_FILTERS) for a new register_filter/unregister_filter registry) plus new module-level register_filter/unregister_filter functions. If your create_jinja_env() helper centralizes filter application, make sure it applies the global registry before any locally-passed filters so local overrides win. Not blocking on you - proceeding now.
